infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We need your location to notify you when friends are nearby, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to show you nearby friends and send proximity notifications.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: We need your location in the background to notify you when friends are nearby.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: We need to send you notifications when you receive messages or friends are nearby.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Connecti to notify you when friends are nearby, even when the app is closed.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Connecti to access your location in the background to send proximity notifications when friends are nearby.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Connecti to access your location to show nearby friends and send notifications.
